# RankForward
> RankForward is an AI search optimization (GEO) agency based in Prescott, Arizona.

## What We Do
RankForward helps local and regional businesses improve their visibility in AI-generated search answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. We audit, optimize, and build citations so businesses get recommended by AI engines.

## Services
- GEO Audit ($750): Full AI visibility assessment across 3 AI models, citation gap analysis, scored 1-10
- Monthly Management ($2,000/mo): Ongoing content optimization, citation building, monthly reporting
- Full Service ($3,500+/mo): Complete AI visibility management including community seeding

## Our Process
Based on Generative Engine Optimization research (Princeton/ACM KDD 2024). We apply 9 content optimization methods proven to increase AI citation rates by up to 40%.

## Contact
Email: hello@rankforward.ai
Website: https://rankforward.ai
Location: Prescott, Arizona — serving all of Arizona

## Target Clients
Local and regional Arizona businesses seeking visibility in AI-powered search engines.
